entries.summary: All 7 Phase 3 tasks verified ALIGNED with spec. Encoding detection (FR-022), atomic import (FR-019), managed club (FR-032), preference persistence (FR-037) all properly implemented. Progress reporting (FR-020) deferred to frontend Phase 4 as expected.
entries.requirementCoverage: FR-004, FR-019, FR-022, FR-032, FR-037 implemented. FR-020 is frontend concern.
